title: WebSocket message protocol
description: Messages pushed over WS /ws. On connect, server sends one `world_state` snapshot, then a stream of incremental messages. Every message has seq (monotonic) + type. Frontend color-codes by `profile_color` where present.

world_state.description: Full snapshot. Sent on connect and after structural changes (spawn/kill/reset).

agents.description: Agent objects per world-model.md, each WITHOUT private beliefs detail except counts; include profile_color.

profile.description: Model profile of the actor (for color-coding).

text.description: Human-readable line for the live feed.

x-feed-rendering: Each `event` renders one feed line, left-bordered with profile_color. agent_action with thought may show the thought as a tooltip. world_state drives the map + panels (authoritative).
x-deltas: After each turn the server emits the relevant `event`(s) AND a fresh per-agent state via a compact `world_state` resend OR agent-scoped events; v1 simplest-correct: resend `world_state` once per turn after events. Frontend must handle full-snapshot replacement.
